keyMappings:
unmapAll

# Scroll
map j scrollDown
map k scrollUp
map h scrollLeft
map l scrollRight
map J scrollPageDown
map K scrollPageUp
map gg scrollToTop
map G scrollToBottom

# Tab
map t createTab
map yt duplicateTab
map H previousTab
map L nextTab
map x removeTab
map X restoreTab
map g0 firstTab
map g$ lastTab
map gh moveTabLeft
map gl moveTabRight
map ; visitPreviousTab

# Link Hint
map f LinkHints.activateMode
map F LinkHints.activateModeToOpenInNewTab
map D LinkHints.activateModeToOpenInNewForegroundTab
map <a-f> LinkHints.activateModeWithQueue

# URL
map yy copyCurrentUrl
map yf LinkHints.activateModeToCopyLinkUrl
map gu goUp
map gU goToRoot


# History
map < goBack
map > goForward

# Visual Mode
map v enterVisualMode
map V enterVisualLineMode

# Find Mode
map / enterFindMode
map n performFind
map N performBackwardsFind

# Vomnibar
map o Vomnibar.activate
map O Vomnibar.activateInNewTab
map b Vomnibar.activateBookmarks
map B Vomnibar.activateBookmarksInNewTab
map ge Vomnibar.activateEditUrl
map gE Vomnibar.activateEditUrlInNewTab

# Miscellaneous
map ? showHelp
